title: Arabic Numerals
description: Replaces Latin numbers with Arabic numbers
body:
Learning Arabic? Want to replace the Latin numbers in your game with the Arabic versions? Now you can!

Features:
- Replacement of all Latin numbers (e.g. 1, 2, 3) with the Arabic equivalents (e.g. ١, ٢, ٣)
- Vanilla-style Arabic numerals that do not look out of place
- Does NOT modify Roman numerals such as I, II, V, C.

Enjoy your new numbers!
